video_title: Is it worth buying an old LR3 or LR4 in 2021?
transcript: so i always get the question is it really worth it buying an old lr4 or even an older lr3 well hopefully this video answers your question so first we'll start off with the old lr3 i actually just started because i haven't used it in about two weeks because technically i'm getting rid of it right now now this lr3 has about 210 000 miles it's still in great shape it's obviously got the off-road tires it's also got a two inch lift on it the reason why i love these vehicles so much and you can see the new lr4 right back there the reason why i love these vehicles so much is the price point is absolutely amazing you can get one of these right now for probably easily three to five thousand dollars and in pretty decent shape now at that price you're looking at something that's going to have at least 150 000 miles but one thing you have to remember about land rovers that if they're gonna have problems they're gonna have it right around that 120 to 150 000 mile range so if you get one that's over that that seems to be in pretty good condition you're probably lucked out because the previous owner probably did a lot of work to it and hopefully you make sure that you get all the documentation for that like i did so the reason why i'm switching over from the lr4 sorry from the lr3 to the lr4 is simply because i wanted a little bit more inside of the cabin now as you'll know from the lr3 it's a little bit more let's say back in the day-ish its setup and forgive all the trash like i said uh currently in the process of cleaning it out so that i can sell it but it had absolutely none of the comfort features that i actually became used to on some of my other vehicles so it's one of those things where as soon as i saw the lr4 and knew that it was basically almost the able to add in apple carplay to it which makes a ton of difference if you're used to apple carplay it's one of those things that you definitely want i also wanted the black interior too but like i um obviously before i bought it it didn't have the lift it didn't have the tires and if you want me to go into more detail about any of this just simply let me know and i'll make a separate video on all the modifications that i've made i think the biggest thing was the paint this hood and as you can see obviously it's just rain and there's some there's a good amount of water dust on it but that
